name: jstack
description: Universal JStack delivery, launch assurance, specialist capabilities, bounded loops, multi-phase programs, read-only audits, mastery, and MCP evidence workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise delivery, goal programs, and audits for Codex
interface.longDescription: JStack adds five Codex workflows: single-lead development, right-sized specialist subagents, full 11-role team mode, evidence-verified bounded loops or multi-phase programs, and read-only repository audits. Versioned capability routing upgrades those same roles with task-specific methods, required evidence, stop conditions, privacy-safe telemetry, and signed specialist handoffs without granting extra permissions. Its MCP also provides exact readiness, applicability-aware 37-control launch assurance, durable loop and program state, human and external gates, review, QA, security, audit finalization, release readiness, and mastery.
defaultPrompt: Use /j-stack-dev to run the single-lead workflow.
Use /jstack-subagents for a specialist team or /jstack-full-team for all 11 roles.
Use /jstack-loop for bounded or multi-phase verified goal completion, or /jstack-audit for read-only inspection.
